problems.title: Two Sum
problems.pattern: Linear scan with complement lookup — a direct extension of searching for a target

problems.title: Missing Number
problems.pattern: Linear scan to find the absent element in a range 0..n

problems.title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
problems.pattern: Linear scan works as O(n) brute force; contrast with O(log n) binary variant

problems.title: Majority Element
problems.pattern: Linear scan counting occurrences — brute-force linear search per candidate

problems.title: First Missing Positive
problems.pattern: Linear scan with in-place marking to find the first absent value

problems.title: Find Median from Data Stream
problems.pattern: Demonstrates why linear scan (O(n) per query) is inadequate for streams at scale, motivating heap-based solutions
